query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_pdis_lideres,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pv.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_validacao,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pv.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_validacao
FROM pdis p
JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id
LEFT JOIN pdi_validacoes pv ON pv.pdiId = p.id
WHERE u.role = 'lider';
